# Frontend

## Frontend-Only Mode

The Angular app can run without Docker or the .NET backend. Local runtime config is generated from `.env.local` by `pnpm config:local`; the default generated config enables the in-app mock API:

```js
// Generated by pnpm config:local from .env.local.
// Do not edit this file directly.
window.larRuntimeConfig = {
  apiBaseUrl: 'mock',
  environmentLabel: 'Frontend mock mode',
  mockApi: true,
};
```

Treat `apps/transformation-console/public/assets/runtime-config.js` as a generated browser-readable artifact. Edit `.env.local` or pass `LAR_FRONTEND_*` environment variables, then regenerate the file.

Run the UI only:

```sh
pnpm dev
```

Run frontend checks without the backend:

```sh
pnpm lint
pnpm test
pnpm test:e2e
```

Mock data lives in `libs/services/src/lib/mock-api.fixtures.ts`. The Angular app uses `larMockApiInterceptor` when `mockApi` is true, and Playwright imports the same fixture module through `@lar/mock-api-fixtures` so local UI and tests stay aligned.

GitHub Actions uses the same generator path. The frontend CI job sets `LAR_FRONTEND_API_BASE_URL=mock`, `LAR_FRONTEND_MOCK_API=true`, `LAR_FRONTEND_ENVIRONMENT_LABEL="Frontend mock mode"` and `LAR_FRONTEND_ROLE=DeliveryLead`, then runs `pnpm config:local` before build and e2e smoke tests.

For Docker or full-stack review, the nginx container writes `/assets/runtime-config.js` on startup from environment variables. The browser-facing API URL defaults to `http://localhost:5029`:

```sh
LAR_FRONTEND_API_BASE_URL=http://localhost:5029
LAR_FRONTEND_ENVIRONMENT_LABEL="Docker API mode"
LAR_FRONTEND_MOCK_API=false
```

`frontend/docker/runtime-config.js` remains a checked-in reference file, but Docker Compose no longer bind-mounts it over the built asset.

To run the frontend against a local .NET API instead, set this in the repository root `.env.local`:

```sh
LAR_FRONTEND_API_BASE_URL=http://localhost:5029
LAR_FRONTEND_ENVIRONMENT_LABEL="Local API mode"
LAR_FRONTEND_MOCK_API=false
```

Then rerun:

```sh
pnpm config:local
pnpm dev
```

With backend mode enabled, workflow review updates on `/payments` are saved through `/api/workflow-reviews/{slice}/{recordId}` and survive a browser reload. In frontend mock mode they are kept only in browser memory, so a hard reload returns to the fixture values.

## Frontend Commands

Run from `frontend/` unless using the root scripts from the repository root.

```sh
pnpm dev
pnpm build
pnpm lint
pnpm test
pnpm test:e2e
pnpm format:check
```

Useful direct Nx commands:

```sh
pnpm exec nx show project transformation-console
pnpm exec nx graph
```
